attributes.action: Add the second verse to the official national anthem
attributes.additional_details: It is too short. Can't get properly into it.
attributes.background: Please add the second verse because it is too short compared to other countries

rejection.details:
The use of the present National Anthem is a matter of tradition rather than having any legal status.

You can find more information about the history and status of the national anthem here:

https://www.royal.uk/national-anthem
